title: Sim: basic market share run
summary: Run the base scenario and return share and revenue per product.

title: Sim: all scenarios, all subgroups
summary: Run every scenario and subgroup, with net rows.
oce_text:
[sim_db]
excel = "model.xlsx"

[["cs::sim_run"]]
scenarios = ["__all__"]
subgroups = ["__all__"]
measures = "share|volume|revenue"
include_nets = true

title: Sim: run with price override
summary: Run the base scenario with a fixed price override on one product.

title: Sim: first-choice model
summary: Run using first-choice (FC) probabilities instead of share of preference.
